description_long: This object is a stylized, futuristic shotgun with a robust, metallic blue body and a dark brown grip. The barrel is thick and angular, featuring multiple layers and a prominent cylindrical chamber, suggesting a revolver-style mechanism. The grip is ergonomically shaped and capped with a spiked, gear-like pommel, adding a unique visual element. The trigger guard is rounded and substantial, providing ample space for finger placement. Accents of cyan or teal are visible along the barrel and chamber, enhancing its high-tech appearance. The overall design is compact, with a short barrel and a heavy, reinforced frame.
description: A compact, futuristic shotgun with a metallic blue body, dark brown grip, and spiked pommel, featuring a revolver-style chamber and cyan accents.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile, including the spiked pommel, ergonomic grip, and layered barrel with visible chamber.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular barrel opening and the symmetry of the shotgun's design.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the first but with clearer visibility of the chamber and grip details.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the grip and spiked pommel, with the barrel extending away from the viewer.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with a thick, angular design and no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with a smooth contour and no finger grooves
